node.statement: FIRST piece of (5.2): ||P(h o P(t o u))|| <= C sqrt(eta)||r|| ||s|| ||t|| ||u||, where h=h_{r,s}, t,u in A. Note P(t o u) in Im P=A subset B(H)_sa, so it is an admissible insertion argument z:=P(t o u). By the sign identity (node 1.1) h=-q_{r,s}, so P(h o z)=-P(q_{r,s} o z), giving ||P(h o P(t o u))||=||P(q_{r,s} o P(t o u))||. Apply GT-HZ with z=P(t o u): ||P(q_{r,s} o P(t o u))|| <= C sqrt(eta)||r|| ||s|| ||P(t o u)||. Bound ||P(t o u)|| <= ||P|| ||t o u|| <= (1+C eta)||t|| ||u|| (GT-Pprops ||P||<=1+C eta; GT-jb-submult ||t o u||<=||t|| ||u||, V=B(H)_sa a JB algebra via GT-bhsa-jc + GT-jc-is-jb) <= 2||t|| ||u|| (eta<=eta_0<1/4). Hence ||P(h o P(t o u))|| <= 2C sqrt(eta)||r|| ||s|| ||t|| ||u|| = C' sqrt(eta)||r|| ||s|| ||t|| ||u||, constant absorbed.
